verses.1: “For behold, in those days and at that time, When I restore the fortunes of Judah and Jerusalem,
verses.2: I will gather all the nations And bring them down to the Valley of Jehoshaphat. Then I will enter into judgment with them there On behalf of My people and My inheritance, Israel, Whom they have scattered among the nations; And they have divided up My land.
verses.3: “They have also cast lots for My people, Traded a boy for a prostitute, And sold a girl for wine so that they may drink.
verses.4: Moreover, what are you to Me, Tyre, Sidon, and all the regions of Philistia? Are you repaying Me with retribution? But if you are showing Me retribution, swiftly and speedily I will return your retribution on your head!
verses.5: Since you have taken My silver and My gold, brought My precious treasures to your temples,
verses.6: and sold the sons of Judah and Jerusalem to the Greeks in order to remove them far from their territory,
verses.7: behold, I am going to stir them up from the place where you have sold them, and return your retribution on your head.
verses.8: I will also sell your sons and your daughters into the hand of the sons of Judah, and they will sell them to the Sabeans, to a distant nation,” for the LORD has spoken.
verses.9: Proclaim this among the nations: Prepare for holy war; stir up the warriors! Have all the soldiers come forward, have them come up!
verses.10: Beat your plowshares into swords, And your pruning hooks into spears; Let the weak man say, “I am a warrior.”
verses.11: Hurry and come, all you surrounding nations, And gather yourselves there. Bring down, LORD, Your warriors.
verses.12: Let the nations be awakened And come up to the Valley of Jehoshaphat, For there I will sit to judge All the surrounding nations.
verses.13: Put in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe. Come, tread the grapes, for the wine press is full; The vats overflow, for their wickedness is great.
verses.14: Multitudes, multitudes in the valley of decision! For the day of the LORD is near in the valley of decision.
verses.15: The sun and moon have become dark, And the stars have lost their brightness.
verses.16: The LORD roars from Zion And utters His voice from Jerusalem, And the heavens and the earth quake. But the LORD is a refuge for His people, And a stronghold for the sons of Israel.
verses.17: Then you will know that I am the LORD your God, Dwelling on Zion, My holy mountain. So Jerusalem will be holy, And strangers will no longer pass through it.
verses.18: And on that day The mountains will drip with sweet wine, And the hills will flow with milk, And all the brooks of Judah will flow with water; And a spring will go out from the house of the LORD And water the Valley of Shittim.
verses.19: Egypt will become a wasteland, And Edom will become a desolate wilderness, Because of the violence done to the sons of Judah, In whose land they have shed innocent blood.
verses.20: But Judah will be inhabited forever, And Jerusalem for all generations.
verses.21: And I will avenge their blood which I have not avenged, For the LORD dwells in Zion.
